title: Test: Add snapshot testing
original_text: Added snapshot testing with Jest. Implemented snapshot tests for UI components. Added snapshot tests for API responses. Implemented snapshot update mechanism. Added snapshot diff review. Result: snapshot tests pass.

- Add snapshot tests for API responses
